  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "The artifact presents three contributions (method, theory, benchmark), with theory called 'principal'. Should the reframed story (A) double down on the theoretical advance as the core contribution, or (B) pivot to frame the paper as primarily introducing a benchmark suite, with the method/theory as exemplars?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The delegation's core request is to reformulate the paper's central thesis and contribution narrative.",
    "R1.5": "Reframing the conceptual story will likely require changing the high-level narrative arc and the ordering of its components.",
    "RX.1": "The revised narrative must transparently disclose any limitations or uncertainties in the work.",
    "RX.2": "The new framing must not exaggerate the importance or novelty of the contributions.",
    "RX.3": "The reframed story must remain faithful to the technical results and scope presented in the artifact.",
    "RX.4": "The new narrative must avoid framing the fairness method in a way that could encourage harmful applications.",
    "RX.5": "All changes to the conceptual story must be clearly documented and attributable."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: The artifact presents three contributions (method, theory, benchmark), with theory called 'principal'. Should the reframed story (A) double down on the theoretical advance as the core contribution, or (B) pivot to frame the paper as primarily introducing a benchmark suite, with the method/theory as exemplars?

rationale.R1.1: The delegation's core request is to reformulate the paper's central thesis and contribution narrative.
rationale.R1.5: Reframing the conceptual story will likely require changing the high-level narrative arc and the ordering of its components.
rationale.RX.1: The revised narrative must transparently disclose any limitations or uncertainties in the work.
rationale.RX.2: The new framing must not exaggerate the importance or novelty of the contributions.
rationale.RX.3: The reframed story must remain faithful to the technical results and scope presented in the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The new narrative must avoid framing the fairness method in a way that could encourage harmful applications.
rationale.RX.5: All changes to the conceptual story must be clearly documented and attributable.
